text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Vaccine Information * COVID-19 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter COVID-19 Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Seasonal Flu COVID-19 Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an online map of flu shot and COVID-19 vaccination locations searchable by zip code.
